name: analyst-tool
description: Local web tool for browsing and editing Excalidraw boards with NaCl skill integration

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names server,web "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=server && npm run lint --workspace=web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=server && npm run typecheck --workspace=web
